div.style: font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; background: #f9f9f9; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden;

div.p: A sign-in attempt to your account requires verification. Use the code below to complete your login.

div.style: background: #f4f1f8; border: 2px solid #714B67; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; padding: 24px 16px; margin: 0 0 28px 0;

p.style: margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 13px; color: #888888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; font-weight: 600;
margin: 0; font-size: 42px; font-weight: 700; color: #714B67; letter-spacing: 10px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;

div.style: background: #fff8e1; border-left: 4px solid #f59e0b; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 16px; margin: 0 0 20px 0;
div.p: ⏱ This code expires in 5 minutes. Do not share it with anyone.

div.style: background: #fef2f2; border-left: 4px solid #ef4444; border-radius: 4px; padding: 12px 16px; margin: 0 0 24px 0;
div.p: 🔒 Security Notice: If you did not attempt to log in, please change your password immediately and contact your administrator.
This is an automated message from . Please do not reply to this email.

div.style: background: #f4f1f8; padding: 16px 32px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e8e0ef;
